pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which dynamically generates this file.
Confirmed via verifier.py and export_result.sh which check this exact path.
Confirmed via verifier.py and export_result.sh which check this exact path.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which writes task counts here, and export_result.sh which reads it.

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically generates a synthetic maintenance log at /home/ga/Projects/samples/maintenance_log.xml. The completed work orders are to be moved to /home/ga/Projects/archive.xml, while active work orders must be saved to /home/ga/Projects/active_log.xml. The task setup script also creates /tmp/initial_counts.json to track the generated counts for verification. All metadata file paths have been verified by inspecting the setup, export, and verifier scripts.
